Directionality of 1.0 confirms this trader never takes contested positions. The realized PnL of -$6.18 despite 86 resolved trades and domain accuracy at exactly 0.5 across all domains reflects the inherent tail-risk of this strategy: one wrong resolution wipes many small gains.

domain_summary: This trader has no identifiable forecasting edge in any domain. All activity is mechanical yield-harvesting at near-certainty prices; the 0.5 accuracy across all domains is an artifact of occasional tail losses on positions priced at 0.997+, not genuine domain knowledge.
signal_weight_reasoning: All entries are at 0.994–0.999 NO prices with directionality of 1.0. open_positions_summary: 15 open NO positions across US election sub-markets (Nebraska CD2, Senate races, Governor races), balance-of-power outcomes, and miscellaneous political questions. All entries between 0.984–0.999. The aggregate thesis is 'nothing unusual happens in US elections' — a structural bet on status-quo outcomes. Expected aggregate gain is minimal; tail risk on any single surprise resolution is disproportionate.

summary: This trader is a pure yield-harvester with no forecasting signal value whatsoever. Every trade is a NO at 0.994–0.999 across US and international political markets, representing mechanical premium collection rather than genuine probabilistic assessment. Despite a high raw ELO inflated by volume, the negative realized PnL and 50% domain accuracy reveal that tail losses regularly negate gains. This address should be excluded from all signal generation pipelines.
